hooks.command: osascript -e 'if application "iTerm" is running then' -e 'tell application "iTerm"' -e 'if not frontmost then' -e 'display notification "Claude is waiting for your approval" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Ping"' -e 'end if' -e 'end tell' -e 'end if'

osascript -e 'if application "iTerm" is running then' -e 'tell application "iTerm"' -e 'if not frontmost then' -e 'display notification "Claude is waiting for your approval" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Ping"' -e 'end if' -e 'end tell' -e 'end if'
